meta.name: On Patrol: Live Special
meta.description: The most intense, jaw-dropping and unforgettable moments from REELZ’s hit documentary series On Patrol: Live. These specials show highlights from the more than 50 cameras rolling live on Friday and Saturday nights, following law enforcement officers from across the country. It’s an unflinching look at everything from high-speed pursuits and unpredictable pit maneuvers, to the takedown of felons on the run, surprising hiding spots, and officer interactions with their communities.
